#### Command Example
Human Readable Output
#
sixgill-get-actor
#
Returns information and a reputation for each actor in the input list.
Base Command
#

Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### sixgill-get-post-id
***
Returns information and a reputation for each post ID in the input list.
#### Base Command
`sixgill-get-post-id`

outputs.description: Date The timestamp when the actor shared their first IOC. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.id
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.created

outputs.description: The unique ID of the actor. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.description The description of the actor.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The language of the original post in the Sixgill portal. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.modified Date
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.lang

outputs.description: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.pattern A list of the IOCs shared by the actor. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_actor
outputs.name: The timestamp when the actor was last modified.

outputs.description: The actor of the original post on the dark web. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_confidence The confidence score of the actor.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The Subfeed ID of the actor. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_feedname The Subfeed name of the actor.
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_feedid

outputs.description: The ID of the post in the Sixgill portal. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_posttitle The title of the post in the Sixgill portal.
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_postid

outputs.description: The severity score of the actor. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_source The source of the post in the Sixgill portal.
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.sixgill_severity

outputs.description: The STIX specification version. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.type The STIX object type.
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.spec_version

outputs.description: Date The creation date of the post in the Sixgill portal. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.labels
outputs.name: SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.valid_from

outputs.description: The indicative labels of the actor. SixgillDarkfeed.Actor.external_reference Link to the IOC on Virustotal and an abstraction of the number of detections; MITRE ATT&CK tactics and techniques.
outputs.name: Unknown
